title: The ACID Properties of Database Transactions
description: A visual breakdown of the four fundamental properties (ACID) that ensure reliable transaction processing in a DBMS.
relationships: The four properties are the pillars of a reliable transaction. Atomicity ensures the transaction is all-or-nothing. Consistency ensures the database moves from one valid state to another. Isolation ensures concurrent transactions do not interfere with each other. Durability ensures that once committed, a transaction's changes are permanent.
